/usr/bin/c++  -g -Wall -pthread -g CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/src/client_sdk/demo_cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/src/client_sdk/kv_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/src/client_sdk/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/common.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/kv_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/pd_rpc.pb.cc.o CMakeFiles/dkv_cli.dir/raft_rpc.pb.cc.o -o ../bin/dkv_cli   -L/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hsj/build/release-install-cpp11/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so -lpthread
